title: Croatian Fettuccine Stir Fry
description: A quick and spicy fettuccine stir fry with a Croatian twist, featuring crispy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Spicy Croatian sausage
ingredients.notes: use vegetarian option for veggie version

instructions: Cook fettuccine according to package instructions.
In a large skillet or wok, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add spicy sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add bell pepper and onion to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add garlic, if using, and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add cooked fettuccine to the skillet and toss everything together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with crispy fried onions and chopped parsley, if desired.
